title: MD
biography: Masato Tanaka is a Japanese gastroenterologist who pioneered endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD), a minimally invasive technique for removing early-stage gastrointestinal cancers.
aiSummary: Masato Tanaka is a gastroenterology specialist at National Cancer Center Hospital. Based in Japan.
